data.title: CFTC fines EmpiresX founder $130 million for crypto fraud
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) announced that a U.S. federal court has ordered more than $130 million in fines and compensation to the Brazilian founders of EmpiresX, an illegal cryptocurrency investment platform. On February 4, U.S. District Court Judge Cecilia Altonaga of the Southern District of Florida imposed permanent injunctions, financial penalties, and other legal actions on EmpiresX founders Emerson Pires, Flavio Goncalves, and their partner Joshua Nicholas. The case was originally filed on June 30, 2022, and a default judgment was ultimately made because the defendants failed to respond to the charges before the deadline.
According to court documents, Empires Consulting operated a fraudulent investment program, EmpiresX, that falsely promised investors high returns. Pires and Goncalves are accused of taking at least $40 million from victims through false cryptocurrency ads. Instead of investing the funds as promised, the founders abused them to buy Bitcoin and Ethereum, while restricting withdrawals and showing false profits from non-existent investments. The founders of EmpireX used the funds for personal expenses, including luxury goods and travel. Despite this, investigators recovered about $22.8 million in digital currency from them. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: CFTC Orders Over $130 Million Penalty For EmpiresX Founders
data.description:
According to Odaily, the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) announced that a U.S. federal court has ordered the Brazilian founders of the illegal cryptocurrency investment platform EmpiresX to pay over $130 million in fines and restitution. On February 4, Judge Cecilia Altonaga of the Southern District of Florida issued a permanent injunction, economic penalties, and other legal actions against EmpiresX founders Emerson Pires, Flavio Goncalves, and their associate Joshua Nicholas. The case was initially filed on June 30, 2022, and resulted in a default judgment due to the defendants' failure to respond to the charges by the deadline.

Court documents reveal that Empires Consulting operated a fraudulent investment scheme known as EmpiresX, which falsely promised high returns to investors. Pires and Goncalves were accused of obtaining at least $40 million from victims through deceptive cryptocurrency advertisements. Instead of investing these funds as promised, the founders misused them to purchase Bitcoin and Ethereum, restricted withdrawals, and displayed fictitious profits from non-existent investments. The EmpiresX founders used the funds for personal expenses, including luxury purchases and travel. Despite these actions, investigators managed to recover approximately $22.8 million in digital assets from them.

data.title: CFTC fines EmpiresX founders $130M in crypto fraud case
data.description:
A US court fined the Brazilian founders of EmpiresX over $130 million for operating a fraudulent crypto scheme that misled investors.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cftc-empirex-crypto-scam-130m-penalty?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BlackRock sets its sights on Europe: a Bitcoin ETP is coming to the Swiss market
data.description:
The asset management giant, following the success of its spot ETF in the United States, is preparing to enter Europe with a financial product linked to Bitcoin.
The post BlackRock sets its sights on Europe: a Bitcoin ETP is coming to the Swiss market appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/blackrock-sets-its-sights-on-europe-a-bitcoin-etp-is-coming-to-the-swiss-market/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=blackrock-sets-its-sights-on-europe-a-bitcoin-etp-is-coming-to-the-swiss-market

data.title: Megabit will launch XVG/USDT contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Megabit will officially launch XVG/USDT contract trading at 18:00 (SGT) on February 6.

data.title: USDC Treasury minted approximately 68.92 million USDC on the Ethereum chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, USDC Treasury minted 68,925,352 new USDC on the Ethereum chain two minutes ago.

data.title: MetaMask: Added ENS domain name transfer function
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto wallet application MetaMask published a statement saying that it has added a new ENS domain name transfer function, which currently supports the Ethereum and Linea mainnets.

data.title: TMC's market value has increased more than 10 times in the past week, and the top 3 holding addresses are still in a loss state
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, TMC's market value rose to 7.8 million US dollars from the bottom of 700,000 US dollars in the past week. The community CTO gradually raised the price of the currency and successfully recalled the "missing person" DEV @traviscline. The current situation of TMC TOP3 holding addresses is analyzed as follows: 
The first address 3QnBe...ZoRie
On the first day of listing, 16,000 US dollars were invested to buy 31.32 million tokens at an average price of 0.0005189 US dollars. Now there is a floating profit of 220,000 US dollars, but the profit has retreated by 920,000 US dollars from the peak of the currency price; 
The second address Dd998...z4aAr
A total of 441,000 US dollars were invested to buy 26.79 million tokens at 0.01646 US dollars. Now there is a floating loss of 239,000 US dollars (about 54.2%), and there has been no selling operation so far; 
The third address 9QbKG...2jGwF
A total of The price of Bitcoin was US$532,000. The more it fell, the more he bought. As of now, the floating loss is US$324,000 (about 60.6%). This address once made a profit of more than US$1.2 million through SWARMS/BUZZ/arc.

data.title: Gate.io will launch BERA perpetual contracts, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will launch the first BERA perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.
CoinGecko data shows that Gate.io has cumulatively supported more than 600 perpetual contract currencies and is the preferred platform for more than 20 million users worldwide.
